column2: 1.) the ENTRY NAMEs should be unique but are otherwise unimportant
2.) only one of UNITTYPE (an actual unit type) or QUICKSTART FAMILY (an entry in DbQuickStart_Families.ddf) should be specified

3.) the FAMILY TYPE can be Standard or IslandsOnly or InAirport (leave blank for Standard) - if InAirport is specified, an Airport must precede this entry, and this airplane will start out garrisoned in the airport
4.) the arrays are indexed by army size [advanced large huge]
NOTE:  Citizens MUST come first, they're required for the building placement to work.  CityCenters are AUTOMATICALLY ALWAYS PLACED, and should not be included in this table.
